content: The iterative search-based knowledge construction process that characterizes incomplete 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory research (evidenced by fragmented, recursive search traces) itself models how next-generation agent memory should work: agents actively query only fragmented, high-uncertainty memory slots instead of pre-loading entire stored knowledge structures, updating memory incrementally as new information is retrieved. This turns the messy, incomplete research process into a blueprints for a more efficient active memory architecture.
